## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?
- Which package areas were affected?

## Governance Check

- [ ] Branch follows Gitflow naming (`feature/`, `release/`, `hotfix/` or `support/`)
- [ ] PR title follows semantic format (`type(scope): summary`)
- [ ] Commits follow semantic commit format
- [ ] This PR is marked with the `needs-review` label
- [ ] GitHub review request is active
- [ ] Linked issue is referenced when applicable

## Impacted Areas

- [ ] Agents
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Memory
- [ ] Workflows
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Governance

## Validation

- [ ] Related documentation reviewed
- [ ] Related workflow or template reviewed
- [ ] Memory/history reviewed if structural change exists
